actor_relation_claims.quote_text: for purposes of funding the merger consideration an aggregate of $594 million of capital (the Pamplona commitment amount), which is committed pursuant to the Pamplona commitment letter delivered to the Buyer Entities by Pamplona Capital Partners III, L.P. dated as of October 14, 2013.
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: committed $594 million of capital for purposes of funding the merger consideration

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: The commitment amount will be used by the Buyer Entities to fund the merger consideration at closing (including as a result of a judgment of specific performance) and any other payments to be made by the Buyer Entities or Mac-Gray at closing, and all associated costs and expenses of the merger for which the Buyer Entities are responsible, which we refer to as the closing funding obligations.
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: commitment amount will be used to fund the merger consideration and closing funding obligations

event_claims.description: The merger agreement has no condition to the Buyer Entities' or Merger Subsidiary's obligations relating to receipt of financing by the Buyer Entities.
event_claims.quote_text: The merger agreement does not contain any condition to the obligations of the Buyer Entities or Merger Subsidiary relating to the receipt of financing by the Buyer Entities.

event_claims.description: Pamplona Capital Partners III, L.P. delivered a commitment letter committing an aggregate of $594 million of capital for purposes of funding the merger consideration.
event_claims.quote_text: for purposes of funding the merger consideration an aggregate of $594 million of capital (the Pamplona commitment amount), which is committed pursuant to the Pamplona commitment letter delivered to the Buyer Entities by Pamplona Capital Partners III, L.P. dated as of October 14, 2013.
